category_sources: source_facts.description states this is a command-line tool for sharing terminal over the web.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official ttyd documentation site.
source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository with wiki and README documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies terminal sharing over the web.
source_facts.executables lists ttyd as the command-line executable.
